segments.text: And going for that deep bair!
segments.original_text: そして空後一気に深くまで狙っていく

segments.text: Up B catches them! How will they get back?
segments.original_text: 上B巻き込んでこれはどう戻るか

segments.text: Makes it back to ledge with a directional airdodge!
segments.original_text: 回避がなんとか移動回避で崖に捕まることができました
崖際から空後ビハインド

full_text: And going for that deep bair! Up B catches them! How will they get back? Makes it back to ledge with a directional airdodge! Bair from the ledge!

corrections.rule: 空中後ろ misheard as 空中城
空中後ろ misheard as 空中城 + 崖以外→崖際
